comment: Layer C integration cases applicable to the weno5_advection_2d rule. The smooth_2d_convergence case verifies asymptotic 5th-order reconstruction on a phase-shifted 2D sine via the rule's axes.x/axes.y blocks (dimension-by-dimension splitting per Shu 1998 §2.2). It is the operational substitute for the Layer B sweep until ESS gains a 2D WENO5 dispatch (see ../convergence/input.esm skip_reason).
